_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Task OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.510), RM-T-001 (RM, cosine: 0.484).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.560). Shared vocabulary: [plan]. NICE-only terms [implementation, strategies] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.883, R=0.834). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the NICE element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Plan implementation strategies" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.594 ≈ STS 0.560 (gap 0.034). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [plan] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [plan]. NICE-only: [implementation, strategies]. WIDAI-only: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain].
